title: Latency Moving Average
description: Compute a simple moving average over the last N latency measurements for a monitoring dashboard.
problem: Write moving_average(values, window) returning a list where each element is the average of the last `window` values up to that point (using fewer values at the start).
hint: For each index i, take values[max(0, i-window+1):i+1], compute sum/len, and round to 2 decimals.
